name: thedv91-skills
description: Claude Code skills for code review and React best practices.

plugins.name: pre-merge-review
plugins.description: Review the diff of the current git branch against a target branch, checking only changed code against extensible standards (security, performance, business logic, React/Next.js/Node/TypeScript). Read-only git.

plugins.name: react-compiler
plugins.description: Write React components and hooks fully compatible with React Compiler's automatic memoization.

plugins.name: react-effect-event
plugins.description: Use React's useEffectEvent to separate reactive dependencies from non-reactive latest-value reads inside Effects. React 19.2+.
